## Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the format: `- [Name](URL) - Description.`
- [ ] Description starts with a capital letter and ends with a period.
- [ ] Description does not start with the name of the tool.
- [ ] The project is open source or has a significant open-source component.
- [ ] The project is actively maintained (or marked as historical/deprecated if not).
- [ ] The project has at least 100 GitHub stars (or fills a unique niche).
- [ ] Entry is added to the correct category.
- [ ] I searched for duplicates before submitting.
- [ ] Spelling and grammar are correct.
